goal: Validate whether the microstructure feature family (primarily cf_micro_imbalance_1h) provides a genuine overlay alpha over the immutable base through a disciplined veto-first, lockbox-verified pipeline.
global_constraints: Immutable base active-signal-v1@1 must never be modified or re-tuned
Only microstructure_proxies family is active; all other feature families are locked

Do not reopen closed directions: leadership/breadth as directional edge, path-asymmetry, regime-disagreement, event-only overlays, trade-quality overlays without new information layer, derivatives positioning without real OI/liquidation/basis data
Lockbox overlay comparison (base vs base+overlay on same window) is mandatory before any strong conclusion
Simpler methods must be tested before complex models (bucket rule → threshold → logistic → CatBoost)
Short side is tested before long side at every stage
Veto overlay must be proven before early-cut or directional scout routes are unlocked
net_pnl > 0 must not be used as veto label — too noisy
Feature set limited to micro-core + minimal context support; no re-injection of old large feature packs
No feature/label/threshold selection on lockbox window; lockbox is truth-only

slices.title: Long veto models
slices.hypothesis: Train long-side veto models on frozen labels and compare against short-side results; do not promote long route if it remains noticeably weaker without economic compensation.
slices.objective: Train long-side veto models on frozen labels and compare against short-side results; do not promote long route if it remains noticeably weaker without economic compensation.
success_criteria: Long veto models trained across three label families
Decision recorded on whether long route advances to lockbox
evidence_requirements: Long veto models trained across three label families
Decision recorded on whether long route advances to lockbox

slices.title: Lockbox overlay test against immutable base
slices.hypothesis: Run the decisive lockbox comparison: immutable base vs base+overlay for each surviving veto model, measuring delta PnL, PF, DD, removed-trade quality, weak-window repair, and ownership.
slices.objective: Run the decisive lockbox comparison: immutable base vs base+overlay for each surviving veto model, measuring delta PnL, PF, DD, removed-trade quality, weak-window repair, and ownership.
success_criteria: Lockbox comparison completed for all surviving overlay configurations
Delta metrics computed for PnL, PF, DD, removed trades, winner share, weak-window repair, ownership
Clear lockbox pass/fail determination for each overlay
evidence_requirements: Lockbox comparison completed for all surviving overlay configurations
Delta metrics computed for PnL, PF, DD, removed trades, winner share, weak-window repair, ownership
Clear lockbox pass/fail determination for each overlay

slices.title: Gate for early-cut and directional scout
slices.hypothesis: Evaluate whether lockbox results justify unlocking at most one optional route (early-cut or directional scout) based on strict criteria; keep both locked if evidence is insufficient.
slices.objective: Evaluate whether lockbox results justify unlocking at most one optional route (early-cut or directional scout) based on strict criteria; keep both locked if evidence is insufficient.
success_criteria: Gate evaluation completed for both routes
At most one route opened with documented justification
evidence_requirements: Gate evaluation completed for both routes
At most one route opened with documented justification
slices.gate_hint: Neither route may open if lockbox overlay did not reach at least watchlist quality
